pr.title: Non-record: 11L MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + Full SOTA Stack (mean val_bpb=1.1330, 8xH100 SXM)

output.summary: 11-layer 512d transformer pairs MLP3.5x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, SmearGate+hashing, value residual/gated attention, XSA, and partial RoPE with int6 GPTQ-lite.
techniques: MLP3.5x w/ LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 plus SmearGate, bigram/trigram hashing
Value residual blend, gated attention, and XSA across layers with partial RoPE
Int6 GPTQ-lite quantization followed by sliding-window stride-64 eval
